name: Test: Augmented Tool Path (Agent Cache + GraphRAG + Ingestion)
description: Opt-in test profile for the Augmented Tool Path (see UMSETZUNGSPLAN_AGENT_ENRICHMENT_2026-07-09.md). Enables GraphRAG context injection, knowledge-graph ingestion from agent sessions, and cache-serving for informational final answers on the Claude Code tool-call fast path. tool_choice is 'auto' (not 'required') so a cacheable informational answer is not forced into a tool_use turn. Intended for the horndev test API key / north-mini-code profile only — do not assign broadly until AP5 (write-back) has run in production for several days per the rollout plan.
